AppDescription: MQTT uplink monitor + pluggable payload decoders + tailored RadioBridge dashboards (charts + animations) + configuration/downlinks + cloud integrations. Import gateway JSON history on uplinks page.
AppVersionNotes: Separate custom decoder and encoder directories so same filename no longer overwrites (encoder/decoder API + Decoders page). Tilt sensor dashboard: use high-precision angle field and 15°=vertical / 90°=flat needle mapping. Uplinks/Downlinks load scripts from both dirs.
